Name: Palak Curry
Description: Vibrant, spiced spinach gravy served with Rice.

Name: Butter chicken
Description: Our signature creamy tomato-butter sauce with succulent chicken, served with Rice.

Name: Jackfruit Curry
Description: Tender, young jackfruit simmered in a robust traditional masala.

Name: Salmon Curry
Description: Fresh salmon fillets poached in a delicate, aromatic coconut and spice gravy.

Name: Soya Chunks Vindaloo
Description: A fiery and tangy Goan-style curry featuring protein-rich soya chunks.

Name: Lamb Vindaloo
Description: A bold, spicy, and vinegary Goan classic for those who love a bit of heat.

Name: Tofu Palak Dosa
Description: A healthy, crispy lentil crepe stuffed with sautéed tofu and fresh spinach.

Name: Egg Dosa
Description: Crispy fermented crepes layered with spiced egg. Served with Sambhar and Chutney.

Name: Chicken Dosa
Description: Classic roasted chicken marinated in yogurt and spices, served with savory Tomato Rice and a farm-fresh salad.

Name: Mango Pannacotta
Description: A silky, plant-based tropical delight made with sweet Alphonso mangoes.

Name: Bhanavla
Description: A traditional, savory spiced cake. Crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.

Name: Bhajiya
Description: Crispy, golden-brown vegetable fritters perfectly seasoned with gram flour and herbs.
